      simp only [map_mul, ← single_add]
      ac_rfl
    · rw [← hsI, Ideal.span_le]; rintro _ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact Ideal.subset_span ⟨x, ⟨x.1, x.2, rfl, (hsI ▸ Ideal.subset_span ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩)⟩, rfl⟩

let ι := AddLocalization.addMonoidOf (⊤ : AddSubmonoid M)
    let φ := map ι (RingHom.id k)
    let J := I.map φ
    let S : AddSubgroup G :=
      { carrier := {x | single x 1 - 1 ∈ J}
        add_mem' := fun {a b} ha hb ↦ by
          rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, single_add, ← sub_add_sub_cancel (single a 1 * single b 1) (single a 1) 1,
            ← mul_one (single a 1), ← mul_sub]
          exact J.add_mem (J.mul_mem_left _ hb) ha
        zero_mem' := by simp [J.zero_mem]
        neg_mem' := fun {a} ha ↦ by
          rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, single_neg, ← mul_one (single (-a) 1), ← sub_self (single a 1),
            ← sub_eq_add_neg, mul_sub, mul_one, ← neg_sub (single a 1) 1]
          exact J.mul_mem_left _ (J.neg_mem ha) }
    refine ⟨S, le_antisymm (fun x hx ↦ ?_) (fun x hx ↦ ?_)⟩
    · obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := (Ideal.mem_span_iff_exists_sum _ _).mp hx
      rw [map_sum]
      refine I.sum_mem fun c _ ↦ Ideal.mul_mem_left _ _ ?_
      obtain ⟨⟨a, b⟩, hab, rfl⟩ := hy
      have : φ (single a 1 - single b 1) ∈ J := by
        rw [map_sub, map_single, map_single]
        have : single (ι a) 1 - single (ι b) 1 = single (ι b) 1 * (single (ι a - ι b) 1 - 1) := by
          simp [mul_sub, ← single_add, sub_add_cancel]
        rw [this]
        exact J.mul_mem_left _ hab
      obtain ⟨c, hc, heq⟩ := (IsLocalization.mem_map_algebraMap_iff (Submonoid.map (single · 1) ⊤) (AddMonoidAlgebra k G) _).mp this
      obtain ⟨m, _, rfl⟩ := hc
      have h_disj : ∀ m, single m 1 ∉ I := fun m hm ↦ by
        let aug := lift (1 : M →+* k)
        have : aug (single m 1) = 0 := (Ideal.span_le.mpr (by
          rw [← hsI]; rintro _ ⟨_, _, rfl⟩; simp [aug])) hm
        simp [aug] at this
      exact Or.resolve_left (hI.mem_or_mem heq) (h_disj m)
    · rw [hsI]
      apply Ideal.span_mono
      rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, h, rfl⟩
      rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, map_sub, map_single, map_one]
      have : single (ι a) 1 - single (ι b) 1 = single (ι b) 1 * (φ (single a 1 - single b 1) : k[G]) := by
         simp [φ, map_sub, map_single, mul_sub, ← single_add, sub_add_cancel]
      rw [this]
      apply J.mul_mem_left
      apply Ideal.mem_map_of_mem
      exact Ideal.subset_span ⟨⟨a, b⟩, h, rfl⟩

rw [← hsI, monoidIdeal]
    refine le_antisymm (Ideal.span_mono ?_) (Ideal.span_le.mpr ?_)
    · rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, h, rfl⟩
      exact ⟨a, b, (AddMonoidHom.mem_ker _).mpr (by simp [← f.map_sub, h] at h ⊢; exact h), rfl⟩
    · rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, h, rfl⟩
      simp only [AddSubgroup.mem_toAddSubmonoid, AddMonoidHom.mem_ker, AddLocalization.lift_sub,
        AddLocalization.lift_of, map_sub, sub_eq_zero, f, AddMonoidHom.coe_mk, ZeroHom.coe_mk,
        Additive.ofMul_eq_iff, Units.ext_iff, Units.val_mk0, RingHom.map_sub] at h ⊢
      apply NoZeroDivisors.map_injective (algebraMap (k[M] ⧸ I) (FractionRing (k[M] ⧸ I))) (RingHom.injective _)
      simp [h]

let i : k[M] →+* k[G] := mapDomain (AddLocalization.addMonoidOf ⊤)
    let S : AddSubgroup G :=
    { carrier := {u | single u 1 - 1 ∈ I.map i}
      zero_mem' := by simp
      add_mem' := by
        intro u v hu hv
        simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hu hv ⊢
        rw [single_add, ← add_sub_cancel (single u 1 * single v 1) (single u 1),
            ← one_mul (single u 1), ← mul_one (single u 1), ← sub_mul,
            mul_comm (single u 1 - 1), ← sub_add_cancel (single u 1 * single v 1 - single u 1) 1,
            sub_right_comm, ← mul_sub_one]
        exact Ideal.add_mem _ hu (Ideal.mul_mem_left _ _ hv)
      neg_mem' := by
        intro u hu
        simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hu ⊢
        rw [single_neg, ← mul_one (single (-u) 1), ← sub_add_cancel 1 (single u 1),
            mul_sub, mul_one, ← mul_assoc, single_mul_single, neg_add_self, single_zero,
            one_mul, sub_add_cancel, ← neg_sub]
        exact Ideal.neg_mem_iff.mpr (Ideal.mul_mem_left _ _ hu) }
    refine ⟨S, ?_⟩
    apply le_antisymm
    · rw [hsI, Ideal.span_le]
      rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, hab, rfl⟩
      apply Ideal.subset_span
      refine ⟨a, b, ?_, rfl⟩
      change single (AddLocalization.addMonoidOf ⊤ a - AddLocalization.addMonoidOf ⊤ b) 1 - 1 ∈ I.map i
      rw [single_sub, ← mul_one (single _ 1), ← mul_inv_cancel (single (AddLocalization.addMonoidOf ⊤ b) 1) (single_isUnit _),
          ← mul_assoc, ← single_add, sub_add_cancel, mul_sub, mul_one]
      apply Ideal.mul_mem_left
      apply Ideal.mem_map_of_mem
      apply Ideal.subset_span
      exact ⟨⟨a, b⟩, hab, rfl⟩
    · rw [monoidIdeal, Ideal.span_le]
      rintro x ⟨⟨a, b⟩, hS, rfl⟩
      let f := AddLocalization.addMonoidOf (⊤ : AddSubmonoid M)
      have h_map : i (single a 1 - single b 1) ∈ I.map i := by
        simp only [map_sub, mapDomain_single]
        rw [← mul_one (single (f b) 1), ← mul_sub_one, mul_comm]
        rw [single_sub, ← mul_assoc, ← single_add, sub_add_cancel] at hS
        rw [mul_comm]
        exact Ideal.mul_mem_left _ _ hS
      let S_mon := (⊤ : AddSubmonoid M).map (single (R := k) · 1)
      have : IsLocalization S_mon k[G] := inferInstance
      rw [← IsLocalization.comap_map_of_isPrime_disjoint S_mon k[G] I ?_]
      · exact Ideal.mem_comap_of_mem_map h_map
      · rw [Set.disjoint_left]
        intro y hyI hyS
        let ε : k[M] →+* k := lift_nc (RingHom.id k) (MonoidHom.one _ _)
        have : ε y = 0 := by
          apply (RingHom.mem_ker_iff _).mp
          apply Ideal.le_comap_of_map_le _ hyI
          rw [hsI, Ideal.map_span, Ideal.span_le]
          rintro _ ⟨⟨u, v⟩, _, rfl⟩
          simp [ε, lift_nc_single]
        have : ε y ≠ 0 := by
          rcases hyS with ⟨m, _, rfl⟩
          simp [ε, lift_nc_single]
          exact one_ne_zero
        contradiction

let g : AddMonoidAlgebra k M →+* AddMonoidAlgebra k G := AddMonoidAlgebra.mapDomain ι k
    have h_loc : IsLocalization (Submonoid.map (single · 1) ⊤) (AddMonoidAlgebra k G) :=
      AddMonoidAlgebra.isLocalization_mapDomain _ _ (AddLocalization.isLocalization _)
    have h_disj : Disjoint (Submonoid.map (single · 1) ⊤ : Submonoid (AddMonoidAlgebra k M)) (I \ {0}) := by
      rintro x ⟨⟨m, _, rfl⟩, hx, hx0⟩
      let ε : AddMonoidAlgebra k M →+* k := AddMonoidAlgebra.lift k (fun _ ↦ 1)
      have : ε x = 0 := (Ideal.subset_span (by simp [Set.image_subset_iff]; intro; simp)).trans (Ideal.ker_le_ker_lift _ _) hx
      simp at this
    rw [← hsI, monoidIdeal]
    rw [← IsLocalization.map_comap (M := Submonoid.map (single · 1) ⊤) (T := AddMonoidAlgebra k G) g S.toAddSubmonoid.monoidIdeal,
      monoidIdeal_comap, AddLocalization.map_id_top]
    congr 1
    refine IsLocalization.map_eq_of_le (M := Submonoid.map (single · 1) ⊤) _ h_disj (fun z hz ↦ ?_)
    rw [Ideal.mem_span, Ideal.span_le] at hz ⊢
    · rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, hab, rfl⟩
      exact subset_adjoin ⟨_, subset_adjoin ⟨_, hab, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
    · rintro _ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      exact Ideal.subset_span ⟨_, hx, rfl⟩

let i := algebraMap k[M] k[G]
    let J := I.map i
    let S : AddSubgroup G :=
      { carrier := {x | single x 1 - 1 ∈ J}
        zero_mem' := by simp [J]
        add_mem' := fun a b ha hb ↦ by
          simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at ha hb ⊢
          rw [single_add, sub_eq_add_neg, add_one_mul, mul_sub, mul_one, ← sub_eq_add_neg]
          exact J.add_mem (J.mul_mem_left _ hb) ha
        neg_mem' := fun a ha ↦ by
          simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at ha ⊢
          rw [single_neg, sub_eq_iff_eq_add, eq_comm]
          refine eq_sub_of_add_eq (mul_left_cancel₀ (IsUnit.map i (isUnit_single a 1)).ne_zero ?_)
          rw [mul_sub, mul_one, mul_zero, ← map_mul, single_mul_single, neg_add_self, single_zero,
            map_one, sub_eq_iff_eq_add]
          exact (J.neg_mem ha).symm }
    refine ⟨S, ?_⟩
    rw [monoidIdeal, le_antisymm_iff, Ideal.span_le]
    constructor
    · rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, hab, rfl⟩
      change single (a - b) 1 - 1 ∈ J at hab
      rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add, eq_comm] at hab
      have : i (single a 1 - single b 1) ∈ J := by
        rw [map_sub, hab, mul_sub, mul_one, ← map_mul, single_mul_single, add_sub_cancel]
        exact J.mul_mem_left _ hab
      let S_mon : Submonoid k[M] := (⊤ : AddSubmonoid M).map (of k M)
      haveI : IsLocalization S_mon k[G] :=
        isLocalization_monoidAlgebra_map_toAddSubmonoid M G (AddLocalization.addMonoidOf ⊤)
      obtain ⟨s, hsx⟩ := (IsLocalization.mem_map_algebraMap_iff S_mon k[G]).1 this
      rw [map_mul] at hsx
      exact I.mem_of_mul_mem_right hsx (fun h ↦ by
        let ev := lift k M k (MonoidHom.one _ _)
        have : ev s = 1 := by rcases s with ⟨_, ⟨m, _, rfl⟩⟩; simp [ev]
        have : ev s = 0 := I.eq_zero_of_mem h
        norm_num at this)
    · rw [hsI, Ideal.span_le]
      rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, hab, rfl⟩
      apply Ideal.subset_span
      change single (a - b) 1 - 1 ∈ J
      rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add, eq_comm]
      refine eq_sub_of_add_eq (mul_left_cancel₀ (IsUnit.map i (isUnit_single b 1)).ne_zero ?_)
      rw [mul_sub, mul_one, mul_zero, ← map_mul, single_mul_single, add_sub_cancel, map_sub]
      apply Ideal.mem_map_of_mem
      apply Ideal.subset_span
      exact ⟨hab, rfl⟩

simp only [AddSubgroup.mem_mk, Set.mem_setOf_eq, map_sub, single_sub, single_one, mul_one]
      rw [show single (f a - f b) 1 - 1 = single (- f b) 1 * (single (f a) 1 - single (f b) 1) by simp [← single_add]]
      refine Ideal.mul_mem_left _ _ (Ideal.mem_map_of_mem _ ?_)
      rw [hsI]
      exact Ideal.subset_span ⟨_, ‹_›, rfl⟩
    · rw [monoidIdeal, Ideal.span_le]
      rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, h, rfl⟩
      have : single (f a) 1 - single (f b) 1 ∈ I.map ι := by
        simp only [AddSubgroup.mem_mk, Set.mem_setOf_eq, map_sub, single_sub, single_one, mul_one] at h
        rw [show single (f a) 1 - single (f b) 1 = single (f b) 1 * (single (f a - f b) 1 - 1) by simp [← single_add]]
        exact Ideal.mul_mem_left _ _ h
      rw [← Ideal.IsPrime.isLocalization_comap_map_eq I.IsPrime (M := Submonoid.map (of k M) ⊤)] at this
      · exact this
      · rintro _ ⟨c, _, rfl⟩ hc
        apply zero_ne_one' k
        simpa using (AddMonoidAlgebra.lift (k := k) (G := M) (1 : Multiplicative M →* k)).congr_arg (Ideal.mem_le_ker (by
          rw [hsI, Ideal.span_le]; rintro _ ⟨_, _, rfl⟩; simp) hc)

let aug : k[M] →+* k := lift (1 : M → k)
    have hI : I ≤ RingHom.ker aug := by
      rw [← hsI, Ideal.span_le]
      rintro _ ⟨x, -, rfl⟩
      simp [aug, map_sub, map_one]
    have h_not_mem : ∀ m, single m 1 ∉ I := fun m hm ↦
      one_ne_zero <| (map_single _ _ _).symm.trans <| hI hm
    let A := k[M] ⧸ I
    have : IsDomain A := Ideal.Quotient.isDomain I
    let K := FractionRing A
    let ι : M →* Kˣ :=
    { toFun := fun m ↦ Units.mk0 _ (by simpa [A] using h_not_mem m)
      map_one' := Units.ext <| by simp
      map_mul' := fun x y ↦ Units.ext <| by simp }
    let φ := AddLocalization.lift (⊤ : AddSubmonoid M) (Additive Kˣ)
      (Additive.ofMul.toMonoidHom.comp ι) (fun _ _ ↦ ⟨_, add_neg_self _, neg_add_self _⟩)
    refine ⟨φ.ker, ?_⟩
    apply le_antisymm
    · rw [monoidIdeal, Ideal.span_le]
      rintro _ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      obtain ⟨a, b, rfl⟩ := AddSubgroup.mem_subPairs.1 hx
      rw [AddMonoidHom.mem_ker, map_sub, sub_eq_zero] at hx
      apply_fun Multiplicative.toMul at hx
      simp only [φ, AddLocalization.lift_of, MonoidHom.coe_comp, MonoidHom.coe_mk, OneHom.toFun_eq_coe,
        Function.comp_apply, Additive.toMul_ofMul, Additive.ofMul_apply] at hx
      rw [Units.ext_iff, Units.val_mk0, Units.val_mk0] at hx
      exact Ideal.Quotient.eq.1 hx
    · rw [← hsI, Ideal.span_le]
      rintro _ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
      apply Ideal.subset_span
      apply AddSubgroup.mem_subPairs.2
      simp only [φ, AddMonoidHom.mem_ker, map_sub, sub_eq_zero, AddLocalization.lift_of,
        MonoidHom.coe_comp, MonoidHom.coe_mk, OneHom.toFun_eq_coe, Function.comp_apply,
        Additive.ofMul_apply]
      apply_fun Additive.ofMul
      rw [Additive.ofMul_toMul, Units.ext_iff, Units.val_mk0, Units.val_mk0]
      exact Ideal.Quotient.eq.2 (Ideal.subset_span ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩)
